## Description

Please provide a brief description of the changes proposed in this Pull Request (PR) and why they are necessary. If you are adding a new tell or visual cliché, please briefly explain what makes it a default AI output.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New AI slop tell/cliché addition (to `skills/` or `docs/`)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Chore

## Verification

Explain how you verified these changes (e.g. tested the skill locally using `npx skills use .`, ran a web page audit using the updated docs/detecting-ai-slop.md checklist).

## Checklist

- [ ] My code/documentation follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
